# Pull Request

## What does this change?
Brief description of what's in the PR.

## Why?
Link to issue or explanation of the use case.

## How was it tested?
- [ ] Added unit tests
- [ ] Tested manually (describe steps)
- [ ] Updated existing tests
- [ ] Tested on Windows / Mac / Linux

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style
- [ ] I've run `python -m pytest tests/python/` and tests pass
- [ ] I've run `cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit` and TypeScript is clean
- [ ] I've updated the documentation if user-facing
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] I've added myself to CONTRIBUTORS.md if it's my first PR

## Screenshots (for UI changes)

## Breaking changes?
[ ] Yes, this is a breaking change. Migration notes:

## Additional context
